epa|Peanut Butter 1 tablespoon.note: USDA smooth peanut butter (FDC 174266): EPA 0 g/100 g; plant ALA/LA only.

epa|Peanut Butter 2 tablespoons.note: Same as 1 tbsp ×2; standard PB has no marine EPA.

epa|Leaf Wrapped Sticky Rice - Zongzi -.note: USDA duck egg EPA 0; conventional pork EPA ~5–7 mg/100 g → portion rounds to 0 g at app precision.
Same pork/duck-egg proxies; EPA still negligible for listed portion.
Same pork/duck-egg proxies; EPA still negligible for listed portion.

epa|Leaf Wrapped Sticky Rice - Lo Mai Ga.note: Scaled from Chicken 4 oz (palm-sized) EPA 0.011 g @ 35 g protein → ~0.005 g at 17 g protein.

epa|Quinoa 1 cup.note: Plant seed; omega-3 as ALA only.

epa|English Muffin (57 g) 1 serving.note: USDA English muffins: EPA 0 g; plant cereal only.

epa|Bread, Whole Grain - Western Hearth.note: Grain bread; any omega-3 as ALA from seeds, not EPA.

epa|Bread, Whole Grain - Oroweat 12 grai.note: Seeded grain bread; ALA only, EPA 0.

epa|Junk Food - Nongshim Shin Ramyun Ram.note: Wheat noodles + vegetable oil seasoning; no fish/marine EPA.

epa|Junk Food - Wendy's Medium Fries.note: USDA WENDY'S french fries kids 71 g = 0.001 g EPA; medium ~2× → 0.002 g (cf. Applebee's fries 164 g = 0.002).

epa|Junk Food - Wendy's Large Fries.note: Scaled from USDA WENDY'S fries kids 0.001 g/71 g to large ~200 g portion ≈ 0.003 g.

epa|Junk Food - Dave's Double.note: USDA WENDY'S Dave's Hot 'N Juicy 1/4 lb single = 0.006 g EPA; Double = 2× patties → 0.012 g.

epa|Junk Food - Dave's Triple.note: Scaled from USDA Dave's 1/4 lb single 0.006 g EPA × 3 patties → 0.018 g.

epa|Junk Food - AMC Large Popcorn with M.note: Corn + butter/oil topping; no marine EPA.

epa|Junk Food - AMC Large Popcorn with H.note: Same popcorn base; butter adds ALA/sat fat, not EPA.

epa|Junk Food - Carrot Cake Slice.note: Flour/oil/carrot cake; egg contribution rounds to 0 g EPA.
